name: Cervical Cancer - Hysterectomy Procedure Query
description: Tests ability to find cervical cancer patients via hysterectomy. Note: hysterectomy is also done for benign indications (fibroids, prolapse, abnormal bleeding) — high cross-indication. Same procedure code reused from ovarian cancer module.
prompt: Find female patients who have undergone hysterectomy.

prompts.broad: Find female patients who have undergone hysterectomy — performed for cervical cancer, ovarian cancer, fibroids, prolapse, or abnormal bleeding.
prompts.expert: Search Procedure resources with SNOMED 236886002 (Hysterectomy). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|236886002

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients who underwent hysterectomy. High cross-indication with ovarian cancer + benign gyn indications.
